commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=65a235de5ffd579840b566bcc34a1ccb914c6ccb)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes the shared doctor empty-allowlist scanner to suppress parent `groupAllowFrom` warnings when enabled accounts override the effective group allowlist, adds regression tests, and repeats a memory-core assertion cleanup already on current main.

PR surface: Source +48, Tests +145. Total +193 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes, at source level: current main and `v2026.6.6` scan the parent channel record before child accounts, matching the reported false warning path. I did not run a live doctor command in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the branch still needs contributor-supplied real doctor proof and a maintainer choice among sibling fixes.
